title: AAC SMP Pack
description: A collection of Datapacks, Mods, and Server Utilities that won't break a world between versions. Expands building and roleplay capabilities without adding any new blocks or items! Great for Vanilla servers!
body:
**AAC SMP is a Private Server that is Vanilla with some mods that do not introduce new content, but small RP elements. Datapacks may introduce some content, but will not cause possible corruption between updates.**

Prior to 1.21.7 (2.0.0), the modpack was divided between the server version (for server hosts), and the client version (for individual players to connect with). However, starting with 1.21.7, the modpack is designed to be fully compatible with vanilla clients. As such, players can join with any client-sided pack they desire.

Also beginning with 1.21.7, the modpack keeps in mind bedrock edition crossplayability. Geyser is now included, and certain mods and features are excluded if there is a specific compatability. This allows players from more devices to join your server.

**Packaged Datapacks:**
- [All Mob Heads](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/all-mob-heads) by MLDEG
- [Armor Statues](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/armor-statues-datapack) by Mukitanuki (temporarily not included in latest ver.)
- [BlazeandCave's Advancement Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazeandcaves-advancements-pack) by Cavinator1
- [Better Hanging Signs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-hanging-signs) by efeketket
